items.headline: Anaheim Ducks, Edmonton Oilers trade chances in run-and-gun Game 3
items.description:
ANAHEIM -- Defense optional.
With the amount of speed and offensive talent at their disposal, the Anaheim Ducks and Edmonton Oilers went into default mode and traded chances once again in Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round.

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers Anaheim Ducks Game 3 recap April 24, 2026
items.description: ANAHEIM — Beckett Sennecke and Leo Carlsson scored 42 seconds apart early in the third period, sparking the Anaheim Ducks to a four-goal period and a 7-4 win against the Edmonton Oilers in Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round at Honda Center on Friday.

items.headline: Utah Mammoth ‘energized’ by fans, wins first home playoff game
items.description:
SALT LAKE CITY -- The puck slid slowly into the high slot, and the fans tensed with anticipation. MacKenzie Weegar took three strides from the right point, wound his stick blade over his head and fired a slap shot into the net at 12:59 of the first period.
Mayhem.
The

items.headline: Vegas Golden Knights Utah Mammoth game 3 recap April 24 2026
items.description: SALT LAKE CITY -- Lawson Crouse scored twice for the Utah Mammoth, who won the first home Stanley Cup Playoff game their franchise's history, 4-2 against the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round at Delta Center on Friday.

items.headline: Kirby Dach bounces back in Canadiens Game 3 OT win
items.description: MONTREAL -- As the Montreal Canadiens were in their dressing room during intermission preparing for overtime for the third consecutive game, defenseman Lane Hutson, according to several teammates, looked around at them and said, “I’ve got this.”

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning Montreal Canadiens Game 3 recap April 24, 2026
items.description: MONTREAL -- Lane Hutson scored at 2:09 of overtime, giving the Montreal Canadiens a 3-2 victory against the Tampa Bay Lightning in Game 3 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Bell Centre on Friday.

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Yvan Cournoyer torch Game 3 Lightning
items.description:
When you need a little extra speed, you go to the Roadrunner.
Yvan Cournoyer , a 10-time Stanley Cup champion forward with the Montreal Canadiens nicknamed "The Roadrunner" for his skating speed, carried the team torch into Bell Centre ahead of Game 3 of the Eastern Conference First Round against

items.headline: Utah Mammoth Colorado Avalanche 2027 Winter Classic set for New Years Eve
items.description:
SALT LAKE CITY -- It will be a New Year’s Eve party and more when the Utah Mammoth host the Colorado Avalanche in the 2027 Discover NHL Winter Classic.

items.headline: Youppi gifts Cole Caufield dad Montreal Canadiens hats Game 3
items.description:
Don’t worry Cole Caufield, Youppi has your dad covered.
The Montreal Canadiens mascot gifted the star forward’s dad, Paul, team hats before Game 3 of the Eastern Conference First Round against the Tampa Bay Lightning at Bell Centre on Friday.

items.headline: Minnesota Wild seek spark from Kirill Kaprizov, power play in Game 4
items.description:
ST. PAUL, Minn. -- The Minnesota Wild have matched the Dallas Stars stride for stride at even strength in the Western Conference First Round, meeting the physical demands and pace through three games of a rugged best-of-7 series in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
They've won board battles, received timely goaltending

items.headline: Short Shifts Power Rankings April 24 2026
items.description: Throw out the Xs and Os and join Short Shifts for our own weekly power rankings. What is our criteria? Whatever makes us smile, laugh, cry or any other wholesome feeling. This list is updated every Friday with our top moments of the week.
